title: Outreach Activities
content: Outreach Activities Report On Outreach Activity Awareness Programme on Higher Education and Engineering Studies at Jaypee University of Information Technology (JUIT): 05 June 2026 Report - Celebration of Event of National Mathematics Day 2024 Report on National Mathematics Day – 2023 Celebrated on 22nd Dec 2023 Outreach Activity at Jawahar Navoday Vidyalaya, Kunihar (HP), 18th Dec 2023 An Alumni talk by Dr. Meenakshi Devi, Senior Lecturer in the Department of Mathematical Sciences at Sol Plaatje University (SPU), South Africa, on "An Overview of Research in Algebraic Coding Theory" in online mode on 8th September 2023, 12:15-01:15 PM. Report-Imparting Mathematics Education to Nearby Village Childrens November 2022 An Alumni talk by Prof. Dr. Rajesh Kumar Gupta, HoD Mathematics, Department of Mathematics, Central University of Haryana on "Advantages of Numerical Computation" in online mode on 10th January 2023, 3-4 pm. National Mathematics Day - 2022 National Science Day Symposium (NSDS-22): 28.02.2022 Virtual symposium entitled 'National Science Day Symposium (NSDS-22)' at Jaypee University of Information Technology (JUIT), Waknaghat, in association with Himachal Pradesh Council for Science Technology and Environment (HIMCOSTE), Government of Himachal Pradesh India on 28th Feb 2022. National Mathematics Day (NMD-2021): 22.12.2021 Virtual symposium entitled 'National Mathematics Day (NMD-2021)' at Jaypee University of Information Technology (JUIT), Waknaghat, in association with Himachal Pradesh Council for Science Technology and Environment (HIMCOSTE), Government of Himachal Pradesh India on 22th Dec 2021.
